# session

**Instance Property**

An object that can request to open the extension’s containing app and receives session configuration updates.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor let session: LockedCameraCaptureSession
```

## Discussion

Provided during the initialization of the [doc://com.apple.LockedCameraCapture/documentation/LockedCameraCapture/LockedCameraCaptureExtensionScene]. Only the system can initialize this object.
title: session
